user.title: TickTick OAuth2 Setup
user.description: First, create an app at https://developer.ticktick.com/app with Redirect URL: https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/oauth. Then enter your OAuth2 credentials below.

v2_credentials.title: TickTick Login
v2_credentials.description: Enter your TickTick username and password. These are used with the OAuth2 credentials from the previous step.

data_description.password: Your password is stored encrypted in Home Assistant

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate TickTick
reauth_confirm.description: Your TickTick session has expired. Please re-enter your credentials.

error.oauth_error: Invalid OAuth2 credentials. Please check your Client ID and Client Secret.

abort.no_devices: No devices or projects found on your TickTick account

data_description.completed_tasks_days: How many days of completed tasks to show in companion entity

get_task.name: Get Task
get_task.description: Get a specific task by project and task ID.

project_id.name: Project ID
project_id.description: The ID of the project containing the task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to retrieve.

create_task.name: Create Task
create_task.description: Create a new task in a project.

project_id.name: Project ID
project_id.description: The ID of the project to create the task in. Defaults to Inbox.

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The due date of the task (format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss+ZZZZ).

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to update.

title.name: Title
title.description: The new title of the task.

content.name: Content
content.description: The new content/description of the task.

due_date.name: Due Date
due_date.description: The new due date of the task.

project_id.name: Project ID
project_id.description: The ID of the project containing the task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to complete.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to delete.

copy_task.name: Copy Task
copy_task.description: Copy a task to another project.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to copy.

target_project_id.name: Target Project ID
target_project_id.description: The ID of the project to copy the task to.

get_projects.name: Get Projects
get_projects.description: Get all projects for the authenticated user.

get_subtasks.name: Get Subtasks
get_subtasks.description: Get all subtasks (checklist items) for a specific task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to get subtasks for.

get_tasks_filtered.name: Get Tasks Filtered
get_tasks_filtered.description: Get tasks with optional filtering by project and status.

status.name: Status
status.description: Optional: Filter by status (active, completed, abandoned).

include_subtask_progress.name: Include Subtask Progress
include_subtask_progress.description: Include subtask completion counts in task descriptions.
